prompts.name: Linked Speech Exercise
prompts.user_prompt_template: Generate a Linked Speech Exercise for Level {LEVEL}, Week {WEEK}. Focus pattern: {PATTERN}. Create: 10 phrase pairs (separated vs linked version), 3 sentences with all words linked, 1 paragraph to shadow with linking marks. Return JSON: {phrases: [{separated, linked}], sentences: [], paragraph_annotated, focus_rule_explanation}.

prompts.name: Intonation Pattern Drill
prompts.user_prompt_template: Generate an Intonation Pattern Drill for Level {LEVEL}. Focus: {PATTERN_TYPE} (statement-falling/question-rising/list-pattern/emphasis). Create: 5 pairs showing the same words with different intonation and meaning, 3 dialogues where intonation changes meaning, practice instructions. Return JSON: {pairs: [{text, intonation, meaning}], dialogues: [], instructions, self_check}.
